meta.strategy: Pinterest as an independent, evergreen traffic stream. Pins index in Google and surface in Pinterest search months/years after posting. Focus on educational, save-worthy content that drives traffic to both the lead magnet and the product page.
meta.posting_frequency: 3–5 pins per day minimum (can batch-schedule via Tailwind)
meta.pin_format: Vertical 2:3 ratio (1000×1500px or 600×900px). Dark background with Lumenora brand colours.
meta.tone: Educational and empowering. No fear-mongering. Practical over inspirational.

boards.name: AI Career Strategy
boards.description: Practical strategies for professionals navigating AI disruption — without the hype or panic. Real frameworks, real tools, real results.

boards.name: AI Prompts & Tools
boards.description: Copy-paste AI prompts and tool guides for every professional role — marketing, finance, healthcare, tech, education.

boards.name: Remote Work & Productivity
boards.description: Systems, tools, and strategies for high-performance remote work — including AI productivity shortcuts.

boards.name: Career Growth Strategies
boards.description: Evidence-based career growth strategies for ambitious professionals in the 2020s.

boards.name: Digital Products & Online Business
boards.description: Digital products, online courses, and guides for building income beyond the 9–5.

pin_templates.name: Stat Pin

example.headline: 40% more productive
example.subtext: That's the average gain for professionals who use AI in their workflow
example.cta: Get the free AI career checklist →

pin_templates.use_case: High share potential. Use verified stats only.
pin_templates.background: Dark gradient (#060810 → #0c0f1a) with purple glow accent

pin_templates.name: List Pin

example.headline: 5 AI Skills Every Professional Needs in 2025

pin_templates.background: Dark with numbered cards in accent colour

pin_templates.name: Quote Pin
pin_templates.format: Pull quote with attribution + visual weight

example.quote: AI won't take your job. Someone using AI better than you will.

pin_templates.use_case: Share and repin trigger. Keep quotes punchy and true.
pin_templates.background: Minimal dark with large quote typography

pin_templates.name: Before/After Pin
pin_templates.format: Contrast of old vs. AI-assisted workflow

example.headline: Writing a content brief:
example.before: ❌ Before AI: 6 hours, rough draft, 2 revision cycles
example.after: ✓ With AI: 45 minutes, polished brief, ready to approve
example.cta: Download the free AI career checklist

pin_templates.use_case: High engagement. Makes abstract benefits concrete.
pin_templates.background: Split panel with red/green or dark/light contrast

pin_templates.name: Framework Pin

example.headline: The RISEN Prompt Framework
steps: E — End goal: exact output format
N — Narrow: tone, length, what to avoid

pin_templates.use_case: Very high save rate. Named frameworks perform well on Pinterest.

pin_templates.name: Product Pin
pin_templates.format: Product visual + key benefits + price anchor
pin_templates.use_case: Direct conversion pin. Use sparingly (10–15% of total pins).
pin_templates.background: Brand gradient with product mockup or text-only clean design

pin_templates.name: Lead Magnet Pin
pin_templates.format: Free resource visual with opt-in CTA

example.headline: Free: The AI Career Survival Checklist
example.subtext: 27 actions to protect your income and get ahead — starting this week

pin_templates.use_case: Email list growth. High CTR when positioned as genuinely free.

pins.topic: AI won't take your job quote
5 AI use cases for marketing teams
Domain expertise + AI = unfair advantage quote

pins_30_day_plan.focus: Repins of best performers + evergreen content

primary_keywords: how to use AI at work
keyword_strategy.placement: Include 3–5 keywords in pin description. Lead with the strongest keyword. Use natural language, not keyword stuffing.

pin_description_template:
[Hook sentence with primary keyword]. [1–2 sentences expanding the value]. Save this for [specific use case]. [CTA with URL or 'link in bio'].

#AICareers #FutureOfWork #AITools #CareerDevelopment #ChatGPTTips

tools.design: Canva (use Lumenora brand kit: dark bg, purple/blue/gold accents)
tools.repinning: Join 2–3 Pinterest group boards in AI/productivity/career niche
